sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational activity that is expected and typically has negligible market impact.

headlines.headline: Xelvol Biotech secures $120M contract with a leading cloud platform

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy to host investor day focused on precision manufacturing strategy

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
